description: Accounting defaults for real-estate rent invoicing. No account is hardcoded in code (config-over-code).

fields.description: Credited when a rent invoice is posted.
fields.label: Rent Income Account

fields.description: Debtors account the tenant is billed against (accrual / credit).
fields.label: Receivable Account

fields.description: Liability account holding tenant security deposits until settlement.
fields.label: Tenant Security Deposit Account (Liability)

fields.description: Service item used on generated rent Sales Invoices.
fields.label: Default Rent Item

fields.description: Saudi ZATCA rule: residential rent is VAT-EXEMPT (0%), commercial rent is 15%. The Lease Contract picks the template from its contract_type.
fields.label: Tax (Saudi VAT)

fields.description: Applied to RESIDENTIAL leases (VAT exempt / zero-rated).
fields.label: Residential Template (Exempt / Zero-rated)

fields.description: Accrual policy: submit the rent invoice on its due date so the tenant shows as a debtor in the Statement of Account until paid. Turn off only for a cash (draft-until-paid) policy.
fields.label: Auto-submit rent invoices on due date (accrual)

fields.description: Generate the invoice this many days before its due date (0 = on the due date).
fields.label: Invoice Lead Days

name: Real Estate Settings
